name: Chicken Adobo
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken thoroughly after cutting to ensure all bone slivers are removed.
2. Combine the garlic, bay leaf, pepper, shoyu, and vinegar in a bowl.
3. Marinate the chicken for 2 to 3 hours, turning occasionally.
4. Simmer the chicken in the marinade until tender (20 to 30 minutes).
5. Remove the chicken using a slotted spoon and strain the marinade into a separate container.
6. Heat oil in a pan over high heat.
7. Sauté the chicken pieces in the hot oil until browned.
8. Bring the remaining marinade to a boil.
9. Pour the boiling sauce over the chicken and serve.
